---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Yadavar
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: shahabahreini
---

## 💡 Feature Request

Thank you for helping make Yadavar better! Please describe your idea in as much detail as you can.

---

### Feature Description

> A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

<!-- Write your feature description here -->

---

### Problem This Solves

> What problem or limitation does this feature address?
> Example: *"I always struggle to do X because..."*  or  *"It's frustrating that the App doesn't support Y..."*

<!-- Describe the problem here -->

---

### Proposed Solution

> How would you like this to work? Describe the feature in terms of user experience.
> Example: *"When I tap X, it should do Y..."*

<!-- Describe your proposed solution here -->

---

### Alternatives Considered

> Have you tried any workarounds or alternative approaches? What was missing or unsatisfactory?

<!-- Describe alternatives you've considered here, or write "N/A" -->

---

### Platform

> Which platform(s) is this feature most relevant for?

- [ ] iOS
- [ ] Android
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] All platforms

---

### Additional Context

> Add any other context, mockups, screenshots, or references that might help illustrate the idea.
> (Links to similar features in other apps are very helpful!)

<!-- Add any other context or screenshots here -->

---

*Before submitting, please search [existing feature requests](../../issues?q=label%3Aenhancement) to avoid duplicates. We review all suggestions, though we can't guarantee specific timelines. Thank you for your feedback! 💙*
